# daytona_organization_role (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona organization role by organization ID and role ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_role" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
  id              = "role-id"
}

output "daytona_organization_role_name" {
  value = data.daytona_organization_role.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Daytona organization role ID.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Role creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Role description.
- `is_global` (Boolean) Whether this is a global Daytona role.
- `name` (String) Role name.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Permissions assigned to the role.
- `updated_at` (String) Role update timestamp.
